lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Hello, are you interested in our agility training courses?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, is it difficult?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Nothing is difficult for a Shayzien soldier. If you do the training every day, you can be as good as us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Fair enough. Feel free to give it a go if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Hi, I've seen your moves on the agility course, well done!

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: Do you want to know more about how you've been doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You've not completed any laps of our basic agility course yet. There's been [number] completions and the global best time is [time].

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You've completed 1 lap of our basic agility course with a lap time of [time]. There's been [number] global completions and the global best time is [time].

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You've completed [number] laps of our basic agility course with a best time of [time]. There's been [number] global completions and the global best time is [time].

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You've not completed any laps of our advanced agility course yet. There's been [number] completions and the global best time is [time].
